productDisplayName: Lotto Men White Los Angeles II Sports Shoes
description: Style Note Designed for the Sports junkie who never compromises on style and comfort, the Los Angeles II shoe from lotto comes with a mesh upper and a grippy rubber outsole that keeps you stable on various surfaces. Product Details White shoe with mesh upper, central lace-ups, synthetic overlays, reinforced overlay and branding on the midfoot Padded and meshed tongue and inner Foamy rubber midsole with reactivearch technology  TPU outsole with puntoflex grooves and scooped heel Material and Care Synthetic, mesh Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
